mapper.sql: id, game_date, game_time, away_team, home_team, away_score, home_score, status, stadium, notes, kbo_game_id, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM game WHERE game_date BETWEEN #{start} AND #{end} ORDER BY game_date, game_time
SELECT FROM game WHERE game_date = #{date} ORDER BY game_time
SELECT FROM game WHERE game_date BETWEEN #{start} AND #{end} AND (away_team = #{team} OR home_team = #{team}) ORDER BY game_date, game_time
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM game WHERE status = #{status}

SELECT team, SUM(wins) AS wins, SUM(losses) AS losses, SUM(draws) AS draws, SUM(wins) + SUM(losses) + SUM(draws) AS totalGames, ROUND(SUM(wins) / NULLIF(SUM(wins) + SUM(losses), 0), 3) AS winRate FROM ( SELECT home_team AS team, SUM(CASE WHEN home_score > away_score THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS wins, SUM(CASE WHEN home_score < away_score THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS losses, SUM(CASE WHEN home_score = away_score THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS draws FROM game WHERE status = 'FINISHED' GROUP BY home_team UNION ALL SELECT away_team AS team, SUM(CASE WHEN away_score > home_score THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS wins, SUM(CASE WHEN away_score < home_score THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS losses, SUM(CASE WHEN away_score = home_score THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS draws FROM game WHERE status = 'FINISHED' GROUP BY away_team ) t GROUP BY team ORDER BY winRate DESC, wins DESC
SELECT FROM game WHERE (away_team = #{team} OR home_team = #{team}) AND status = 'FINISHED' ORDER BY game_date DESC, game_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT FROM game WHERE (away_team = #{team} OR home_team = #{team}) AND game_date >= #{afterDate} AND status IN ('SCHEDULED', 'POSTPONED') ORDER BY game_date ASC, game_time ASC LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE game SET kbo_game_id = #{kboGameId} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM game WHERE game_date BETWEEN #{start} AND #{end} AND status = 'FINISHED' ORDER BY game_date, game_time
SELECT id FROM game WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY game_date, id

SELECT FLOOR(AVG(team_game_count)) FROM ( SELECT COUNT(*) AS team_game_count FROM ( SELECT id, away_team AS team FROM game WHERE status = 'FINISHED' UNION ALL SELECT id, home_team AS team FROM game WHERE status = 'FINISHED' ) t GROUP BY team ) avg_games
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO game (game_date, game_time, away_team, home_team, away_score, home_score, status, stadium, notes) VALUES (#{gameDate}, #{gameTime}, #{awayTeam}, #{homeTeam}, #{awayScore}, #{homeScore}, #{status, typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.EnumTypeHandler}, #{stadium}, #{notes}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE game_time = VALUES(game_time), away_score = VALUES(away_score), home_score = VALUES(home_score), status = VALUES(status), stadium = VALUES(stadium), notes = VALUES(notes), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
